CustomField.description: This field is created as part of the BR-4413 to store some of the contact types to display on the field contact type
CustomField.formula: IF ( INCLUDES ( Contact.Type__c , "APP-Apporteur d'affaire" ), "APP-Apporteur d'affaire; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Contact.Type__c , "BROKER" ), "BROKER; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Contact.Type__c , "DAILY CONTACT" ), "DAILY CONTACT; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Contact.Type__c , "Dealer Principle" ), "Dealer Principle; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Contact.Type__c , "DECISION MAKER" ), "DECISION MAKER; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Contact.Type__c , "DRIVER" ), "DRIVER; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Contact.Type__c , "EXTERNAL PARTNER" ), "EXTERNAL PARTNER; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Contact.Type__c , "Insurance broker representative" ), "Insurance broker representative; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Contact.Type__c , "Insurance company representative" ), "Insurance company representative; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Contact.Type__c , "Insurance contact" ), "Insurance contact; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Contact.Type__c , "Internal sponsor" ), "Internal sponsor; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Contact.Type__c , "Owner" ), "Owner; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Contact.Type__c , "Partner" ), "Partner; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Contact.Type__c , "Primary Decision Maker" ), "Primary Decision Maker; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Contact.Type__c , "Sales manager" ), "Sales manager; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Contact.Type__c , "Secondary Decision Maker" ), "Secondary Decision Maker; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Contact.Type__c , "Stakeholder" ), "Stakeholder; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Contact.Type__c , "Temp. Driver" ), "Temp. Driver; ",null )
CustomField.label: Contact Type - Tech 1
